name: Landing page renders hero plus feature grid and CTA navigates to signup
description: The Nora landing page renders a styled hero with the headline and a primary call-to-action, a feature section laid out as a multi-column card grid, and the 'Start studying free' button navigates to a working signup form.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage at the target URL
Wait for the hero section and headline to render
Verify the hero shows a large headline containing the phrase 'study buddy' and a primary 'Start studying free' button, with a trust strip listing labels like SPACED REPETITION and FEYNMAN TECHNIQUE

Verify the feature section below the hero shows at least six feature cards (e.g. Feynman Mode, Smart Flashcards, Research Desk) arranged in a multi-column grid of two-to-three cards per row on desktop width — each card a distinct bordered cell with an icon, title, and description, not a single vertical stack of plain text
Verify the browser navigates to the signup page showing an email input, a password input, and a submit button
